svg.text: base_n = S; NUM_NODES = NN; local GPUs/node = G
M = S, N = S, Ks = S / (NN * G)
LOCAL GPU PROCESS / GPU d (local rank)
REMOTE NODE PEER / GPU d (peer node r)
dual-store: C_local slice result + staging_buf for inter-node send
Receive landing: memory only, no reduce yet
__threadfence_system(); when all NN-1 peer bits arrive: release-store remote_arrived_flag[chunk] = 1
publish increments published_chunks; Step 8 waits until published_chunks == total_chunks
not parallel with Step 7; starts only after every chunk is published
AND local_done_flag -> Step 7 reduce/publish -> Step 8 finish/reset/barrier
Source anchors: src/gemm_ar.cu fused_comp_sm / fused_intra_ar_sm / fused_inter_send_sm / fused_inter_recv_progress_sm / shared_reduce_my_slice_static; proxy Data/Ready WR chain.
